quoteText: And now these three remain: faith, hope and love. But the greatest of these is love.
storyBody: What started as a chance meeting between two people from worlds apart became a love story neither of us could have predicted. From the very first conversation, there was a warmth, an ease, a sense of coming home that neither of us had felt before.

Through every season, every challenge, and every joy, we've grown together in ways that continue to amaze us. Now, surrounded by the people we love most, we're ready to begin the next chapter of our journey — together, forever.
letterBody: From the moment we met, we knew our lives would never be the same. What began as two separate journeys has become one beautiful path. We have been blessed beyond measure by your love, your support, and your presence in our lives.

As we prepare to say "I do," we are filled with gratitude for each of you. You have shaped who we are, individually and together. This celebration is as much yours as it is ours, because without you, our story would be incomplete.
We cannot wait to share this day with you — to laugh, to cry happy tears, to dance until our feet ache, and to begin this new chapter surrounded by the people who matter most.

letterClosing: With all our love, Kifle & Milka

accommodations.name: Viscount Gort Hotel
accommodations.description: A comfortable and affordable option with easy access to both wedding venues. Complimentary parking included.

accommodations.name: Inn at The Forks
accommodations.description: A boutique hotel at The Forks, steps from the ceremony venue. Rooftop spa and river views for a perfect wedding weekend.

accommodations.name: The Fort Garry Hotel
accommodations.description: A Winnipeg landmark since 1913. Stay where the celebration happens, just steps from the ballroom.

accommodations.name: Birchwood Hotel
accommodations.description: A great value option in south Winnipeg with spacious rooms, free parking, and easy highway access to all venues.

giftSubheading: Your love and support mean the world to us. If you wish to honour us with a gift, a contribution towards our future together would be deeply appreciated.
storyLeadQuote: Some love stories are written in the stars, but ours was written over late-night conversations, shared laughter, and a quiet knowing that we had found something extraordinary.

venueInfoBlocks.text:
Our reception will take place at The Gates on Roblin in Winnipeg, a beautiful venue set along the Assiniboine River and surrounded by gardens and green space.
The Gates on Roblin — 3440 Roblin Blvd, Headingley, MB R4H 1A1
venueInfoBlocks.heading: Reception Venue

venueInfoBlocks.text: For guests staying downtown, we are planning to provide a shuttle service from one of the downtown hotels to the venue and back. Shuttle details will be confirmed closer to the date.
Free parking is available on-site, with designated areas for PMRs and senior guests. If you need special assistance or a drop-off closer to the garden entrance, let us know.
